name: Petro Stopping Center New Paris #357
description: Full-service Petro truck stop just inside Ohio at the Indiana line, reached via the US-40 interchange (Indiana Exit 156B), with an Iron Skillet restaurant, showers, laundry, fuel, and truck repair.

name: CAT Scale at Petro New Paris
description: Certified CAT Scale located on-site at the Petro New Paris truck stop near the Ohio-Indiana line.

name: Petro New Paris Truck Wash
description: On-site truck and trailer wash at the Petro New Paris travel center off I-70 at the Indiana line.

name: New Paris Food Mart
description: Independent 24-hour fuel and food mart on US-40 near the I-70 Indiana-line interchange offering truck parking, deli, and showers.

name: Weigh Station I-70 Eastbound (Ohio Entry)
description: Ohio DOT eastbound weigh station just inside the state line near New Paris where I-70 enters Ohio from Indiana.

name: Speedway Brookville
description: Speedway fuel stop and travel center at I-70 Exit 21 in Brookville with a certified CAT scale, deli, and 24-hour convenience store.

name: Speedway Huber Heights
description: 24-hour Speedway with diesel and truck parking at I-70 Exit 36 (OH-202/Old Troy Pike) in the Dayton-north corridor.

name: Love's Travel Stop #605
description: Love's Travel Stop at I-70 Exit 59 in Springfield with roughly 112 truck spaces, showers, Subway and Wendy's, a tire care center, and CAT scale.

name: CAT Scale at Love's #605 Springfield
description: Certified CAT Scale on-site at the Love's Travel Stop at I-70 Exit 59 in Springfield.

name: TA London #24
description: A full-service TravelCenters of America truck stop at the I-70/US-42 exit on the southwest approach to Columbus, with a Country Pride restaurant, showers, laundry and a truck service shop.

name: Love's Travel Stop #969
description: A Love's travel stop that opened in June 2025 along I-70 west of Columbus, with truck parking, diesel service bays, a Hardee's and a CAT scale.

name: Pilot Travel Center #213
description: A 24-hour Pilot travel center on the west side of Columbus at the I-70 Wilson Road exit, with showers, a Wendy's, laundry and a CAT scale.

name: Love's Travel Stop #892
description: A Love's travel stop at the I-70 Etna/Pataskala (OH-310) exit on the east side of the Columbus metro, with truck parking, showers, a Hardee's and a CAT scale.

name: Flying J Travel Center #699
description: Full-service Flying J travel plaza at the I-70 Kirkersville/OH-158 exit with a Denny's, truck fueling lanes, showers, laundry and CAT scale.

name: TA Hebron #39
description: TravelCenters of America full-service travel center at I-70 Exit 126 (OH-37) with a truck repair shop, several restaurants, showers, laundry and CAT scale.

name: TA Truck Service - Hebron
description: The on-site TA Truck Service repair shop at the Hebron TravelCenter offering tire, brake, electrical and roadside assistance for trucks on I-70 east of Columbus.

name: Love's Travel Stop #221
description: 24-hour Love's travel stop at I-70 Exit 160 east of Zanesville offering truck fueling, showers, laundry, tire and truck service bays and a CAT scale.

name: Pilot Travel Center #6
description: Pilot travel center at I-70 Exit 178 near the I-70/I-77 area in Cambridge with a Subway, diesel lanes, showers and 24-hour store.

name: Go Mart #57
description: Independent Go Mart truck stop at I-70 Exit 186 (Senecaville/Old Washington/US-40) with diesel, showers, a deli and roughly 80 truck parking spaces.

name: Love's Travel Stop #563
description: Love's travel stop opened in 2025 at I-70 Exit 208 in the St. Clairsville area with 121 truck parking spaces, a Speedco maintenance bay, CAT scale, showers and laundry.

name: Cambridge Westbound Weigh Station
description: Ohio westbound truck scale on I-70 west of the I-77 junction near Cambridge in Guernsey County.

name: Pine Tree Towing & Recovery
description: 24-hour mobile heavy-duty truck tire, repair and recovery service covering the I-70 and I-77 corridor in the Cambridge area.
